# Project Instructions for Copilot

This is a GitHub Copilot custom agents template project. When assisting with this project:

- Follow best practices for `.agent.md` file authoring
- Use clear, specific instructions in agent definitions
- Prefer read-only tools for agents that shouldn't modify code
- Always include a `description` in the YAML frontmatter
- Use handoffs to create multi-step workflows between agents
- Reference tools using the `#tool:<tool-name>` syntax in agent body text
